benefits.description: Successfully lost most of the weight desired

side_effects.description: Developed strange skin allergy/reaction causing large raised welts at injection sites that itch intensely. Rashes last over a week even with antihistamine use.
Losing hair, had to force self to eat

protocol_notes: Tried multiple mitigation strategies for skin reaction without success: rotating injection sites, taking breaks, diluting, allowing to reach room temperature, different BAC water, changing suppliers. Planning to switch to Tirzepatide due to intolerable injection site reactions.
